---
title: "The Hon. Mrs. Louisa Lilias Greene"
---

## The Hon. Mrs. Louisa Lilias Greene

**Dates:** (1833-1891)

**Maiden name:** (Plunket)

### Description

author, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1875)

### Biography

She married (1852) Richard Jonas Greene. [PB 1948]

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 29th 1876

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
